blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 879 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
